title: Edtech platform raises $4.5M to help teach students how to vibe code | TechCrunch
summary: OpenAI also provided $1 million in credits so schools can access the Imagi x Lovable tool for free. “We continue providing free trials and freemium access thanks to their support,” Palfi said.
